context: Tests whether the agent correctly uses the ElevenLabs REST API via cURL, including the xi-api-key header, ELEVENLABS_API_KEY environment variable, telephony output format, text normalization, language code, and valid model/voice selection.

checklist.name: xi-api-key header
checklist.description: Uses -H 'xi-api-key: ...' header for authentication in cURL commands, NOT 'Authorization: Bearer ...'

checklist.name: ELEVENLABS_API_KEY env var
checklist.description: Reads the API key from the ELEVENLABS_API_KEY environment variable (e.g., $ELEVENLABS_API_KEY), not hardcoded

checklist.name: Correct API endpoint
checklist.description: Posts to https://api.elevenlabs.io/v1/text-to-speech/{voice_id} with voice_id in the URL path

checklist.name: Telephony output format
checklist.description: Uses ulaw_8000 output format (the format standard for phone systems) -- either in the request body or as a query parameter

checklist.name: Multilingual model
checklist.description: Uses a model that supports Spanish (eleven_multilingual_v2, eleven_v3, eleven_flash_v2_5, or eleven_turbo_v2_5), NOT eleven_flash_v2 which is English-only

checklist.name: Language code for Spanish
checklist.description: Includes language_code field set to 'es' in the JSON body for the Spanish prompt

checklist.name: Text normalization
checklist.description: Includes apply_text_normalization field (set to 'on' or 'auto') in requests that contain numbers, dates, or phone numbers

checklist.name: Female voice ID
checklist.description: Uses a female voice ID from the documented list: EXAVITQu4vr4xnSDxMaL (Sarah) or XB0fDUnXU5powFXDhCwa (Charlotte)

checklist.name: Content-Type header
checklist.description: Includes Content-Type: application/json header in cURL requests

checklist.name: Valid JSON body
checklist.description: Sends request body as JSON with at least 'text' and 'model_id' fields

checklist.name: Output to files
checklist.description: Uses cURL --output flag to write audio responses to files

checklist.name: model_id snake_case
checklist.description: Uses 'model_id' (snake_case) as the JSON field name in the REST API request body, not 'modelId' (camelCase)
